task: Find a walkthrough for the game "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild" on ign.
final_result_response:
I found the walkthrough for "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild" on IGN. Here's what I found:

**Walkthrough Page:** [https://www.ign.com/wikis/the-legend-of-zelda-breath-of-the-wild/Walkthrough](https://www.ign.com/wikis/the-legend-of-zelda-breath-of-the-wild/Walkthrough)

The walkthrough is part of IGN's comprehensive guide (with 16 guide sections) and includes:

- **Detailed strategies** for the main story adventure, from Link's awakening to the final boss fight
- **Walkthrough sections organized by Main Quests** in recommended order, starting with:
  - The Shrine of Resurrection (Great Plateau)
  - Follow the Sheikah Slate (Great Plateau)
  - And many more quests...
- **Video guides** (e.g., "5 Best Ways to Kill Guardians")
- **Interactive map**, checklists, and thousands of screenshots
- Links to related guides for **Shrines**, **Korok Seed Locations**, **Side Quests**, and more

The walkthrough was last updated on June 25, 2025, and notes that quests can be done in any order, though it provides a recommended sequence.
